query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A wide-angle nighttime view of a suburban residential street. Two-story houses with illuminated windows line a road that ascends toward the right side of the frame. Bare deciduous trees occupy a grassy yard in the foreground, with branches extending into the frame. Street lamps emit bright light onto the road and surrounding lawn. Overhead power lines stretch between utility poles against a dark sky with scattered clouds. A vehicle is parked along the curb, and shrubs grow near the house foundations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wide-angle nighttime view of a suburban residential street with a deliberately tilted horizon and extreme exposure that blows out the streetlights and crushes the shadows. Two-story houses with illuminated windows line a road that ascends toward the right side of the frame. Bare deciduous trees occupy a grassy yard in the foreground, with branches extending into the frame. Street lamps emit a sickly orange sodium vapor glow across the road and surrounding lawn, tinting surfaces with an unhealthy hue. Overhead power lines stretch between utility poles against a dark sky with scattered clouds. A vehicle is parked along the curb, and shrubs grow near the house foundations.
